calendar.matters:
Claim Of Exemption Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: CLINT VELASCO, 415.333.4352, DEFENDANT IN PROPRIA PERSONA; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CLINT VELASCO'S Claim Of Exemption
IS Denied. COURT TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK'S Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is to be heard at 9:30 am on the Law and Motion calendar. Judge Pro-Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar May-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Clint Valasco, Tel. 415.333.4352, Defendant and Claimant, appearing on his own behalf.
No other appearance.

After hearing, Defendant Clint Valasco's Claim Of Exemption was granted in part. The levying officer is to release any earnings held the to judgment debtor. Order signed. Pro Tem Judge: Ernst Halperin, not reported
